# MCP Time Server DST Handling Tests
# Tests daylight saving time detection and handling

# Build the time server binary
go build -o mcp-time-server .

# Test DST detection for US/Eastern timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"US/Eastern"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"US/Eastern"'
stdout '"is_dst"'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test DST detection for US/Pacific timezone
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"US/Pacific"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"US/Pacific"'
stdout '"is_dst"'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test DST detection for Europe/Berlin (observes DST)
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"Europe/Berlin"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"Europe/Berlin"'
stdout '"is_dst"'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test DST detection for Asia/Tokyo (no DST)
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"Asia/Tokyo"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"Asia/Tokyo"'
stdout '"is_dst":false'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test DST handling in time conversion (DST to non-DST)
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"America/New_York","time":"14:00","target_timezone":"Asia/Tokyo"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"source"'
stdout '"target"'
stdout '"is_dst"'
stdout '"timezone":"America/New_York"'
stdout '"timezone":"Asia/Tokyo"'

# Test DST handling in time conversion (non-DST to DST)
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"Asia/Shanghai","time":"22:00","target_timezone":"Europe/Paris"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"source"'
stdout '"target"'
stdout '"is_dst"'
stdout '"timezone":"Asia/Shanghai"'
stdout '"timezone":"Europe/Paris"'

# Test DST with Arizona (no DST observation)
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"America/Phoenix"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"America/Phoenix"'
stdout '"is_dst":false'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test DST with Indiana (complex DST rules)
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"America/Indiana/Indianapolis"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"America/Indiana/Indianapolis"'
stdout '"is_dst"'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test DST conversion with Australia (Southern hemisphere DST)
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"Australia/Sydney"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"Australia/Sydney"'
stdout '"is_dst"'
stdout '"datetime"'

# Test DST conversion between same DST observing regions
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"convert_time","arguments":{"source_timezone":"America/New_York","time":"10:30","target_timezone":"Europe/London"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"source"'
stdout '"target"'
stdout '"is_dst"'
stdout '"timezone":"America/New_York"'
stdout '"timezone":"Europe/London"'
stdout '"time_difference"'

# Test with UTC (never has DST)
exec mcp-time-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_time","arguments":{"timezone":"UTC"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"timezone":"UTC"'
stdout '"is_dst":false'
stdout '"datetime"'
